title: Advanced Crosshair Recommended Texturepack
description: Although any texturepack and crosshair is compatible with the Advanced Crosshair mod, this one is recommended. Compatible 1.20.x and 1.21.x
body:
# 🎯 Advanced Crosshair – Recommended Texture Pack

This is the **recommended crosshair texture pack** for use with the [Advanced Crosshair] mod.

While **any texture pack and crosshair** can be used with Advanced Crosshair, this one is specially curated for **optimal visual clarity** and **precision**.

## ✅ Features
- Seamlessly compatible with **Advanced Crosshair**
- Designed for versions **1.20.x – 1.21.x**
- Clean and minimal crosshairs for competitive gameplay
- Works with most other texture packs

## 📦 Installation
Just drop it into your resourcepacks folder and enable it in-game. Make sure the Advanced Crosshair mod is also installed for full customization.

> 💡 Pro Tip: Combine with a low-FOV, minimal GUI setup for max focus.

---
